chapter_title.ar: باب حَدِّ الْوَجْهِ الَّذِي يُغْسَلُ وَ الذِّرَاعَيْنِ وَ كَيْفَ يُغْسَلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 18 – Limit of the face which should be washed, and the two arms, and how to wash

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/93)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/93)
text: فَرَضَ اللَّهُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ لِلصَّلَاةِ أَنْ يَبْتَدِئْنَ بِبَاطِنِ أَذْرُعِهِنَّ وَ فِي الرِّجَالِ بِظَاهِرِ الذِّرَاعِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father Is’haq Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws having said: ‘Allahazwj Necessitated upon the women regarding the Ablution (Wudhu) for the Salaat that they should be beginning with the inside of their arms, and regarding the men, with the back of the arm’ (first).
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his brother Ishaq ibn Ibrahim from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il ibn Bazi‘ who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘In the case of women about Wudu’ for Salah (prayer), Allah has made it obligatory in washing their hands to pour water over the interior side of their forearm and for men to pour water over the exterior side of their forearms.’”
